summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TemaDom Marketplace Final iteration with all requirements successfully implemented and working

minor_issues.issue: Registration returns 400 for existing emails (expected behavior)

passed_tests: ✅ Calculator section is FIRST on homepage as main hero (before any other content)
✅ Calculator hero shows '28 услуги' text with 'Пълен обхват' description
✅ Calculator hero shows '28 области' text with 'Цяла България' description
✅ All 28 Bulgarian oblasts present in calculator region selector with correct pricing multipliers
✅ TemaDom logo displays with integrated house icon and 'РЕМОНТ И СТРОИТЕЛСТВО' tagline
✅ 'Публикувай проект' button visible and functional in navbar (data-testid='register-btn')
✅ Example calculation shows Sofia (+20%) pricing with 8,928 € total price
✅ Calculator CTA button 'Изчисли цената сега' navigates to calculator page properly
✅ Calculator page loads with all 28 services including painting, electrical, plumbing etc.
✅ Calculator functionality working - price calculations update correctly when adding services
✅ Navigation links working properly - 'Намери проекти' navigates to projects page
✅ Backend API fully functional with 40/42 tests passing (95% success rate)
✅ Authentication system working for both clients and companies
✅ Project creation with images support working correctly
✅ Payment system and company profiles functional
✅ All regional price multipliers implemented (Sofia +20%, Vidin -18%, etc.)

success_percentage.backend: 95% (40/42 tests passed - only duplicate email validation failing as expected)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all 6 main requirements fully implemented and working)
